name: Milk Chocolate Chip Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. To prepare crust, combine crumbs and margarine in a small mixing bowl. Press into prepared pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes.
5. To prepare filling, combine cream cheese, sugar, flour, egg whites, sour cream, vanilla, and chocolate chips in another mixing bowl.
6. Pour filling into crust.
7. Bake for 55 minutes.
8. Loosen cake from rim of pan.
9. Cool.
10. Chill.
